title: ワールド・イズ・ウマドル♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while we're still basking in the glory of
our accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Something big happens!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I-I'm making my international debut?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's a top Umadol, everybody wants a
piece of Smart Falcon. Naturally, that includes
the international markets.
choice_data_list:
You've received an invitation to appear at the
DWC.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The DWC?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You mean that DWC? The Dokidol ☆ World ☆ Concert?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Where super-duper ultra popular idols from all
around the world gather to compete?
choice_data_list: They're even asking you to be the headliner!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Headliner? Isn't that the star attraction?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Am I about to become an international hit?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wanna go for it, of course!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If it means that my songs will be heard by even
more people...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'll shine bright on any stage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see the determination gleaming brightly in
her eyes—but there's also a trace of hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...I am a bit anxious, sure. I mean, I have no idea
if I'll succeed or not.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I might even end up disappointing my fans...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But still... Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I have you watching over me from backstage, I
bet I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: We can do it if we're together!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
From zero to Umadol, and from Umadol to world
sensation...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Nothing's impossible if the two of us are together.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's why...
choice_data_list:
You're going to stand on center stage—of the
world!

You're going to stand on center stage—of the
world!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's right! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: As a top Umadol, my next stage is the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is appearing at the DWC. The news
spreads like wildfire until it's all anyone can talk
about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then, the big day of the DWC competition
arrives.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Falcooo!
You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna do great!
Get out there and move the whole world with
your music!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Everyone... Did they all come to see me off?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
They even made banners. Look! "Show the world
your true strength!"

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
With everybody believing in me like this, there's
no way I can return home with my tail between my
legs.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks for cheering me on, everyone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make my overseas debut a success!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So keep believing in me, and thanks for the
continued support! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I love you all!
